TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kamaya' == u cidekay a kilang ku kamaya, paylumalumaan paluma i putah i tukus ku kamaya. asu' mukan ku heci. tanektek ku kilang, u matekesay a kilang kuyni. u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika śĮõśüŅ(Ś≠łŚźć:Diospyros strigosa) .
S.PHON: == kamaja Ē~ ° == u ¶id…ôkaj a kir~…ĺaŇč ku kamaja, pajr~…ĺumar~…ĺumaan par~…ĺuma i putańß i tukus ku kamaja. asu Ē~ ° mukan ku ńß…ô ¶i. tan…ôkt…ôk ku kir~…ĺaŇč, u mat…ôk…ôsaj a kir~…ĺaŇč kujni. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika **(**:diospjros strigosa) .
S.FORM: == kamaya' == u cidekay a kilang ku kamaya, paylumalumaan paluma i putah i tukus ku kamaya. asu' mukan ku heci. tanektek ku kilang, u matekesay a kilang kuyni. u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika śĮõśüŅ(Ś≠łŚźć:Diospyros strigosa) .
S.PHON: == kamaja Ē~ ° == u ¶id…ôkaj a kir~…ĺaŇč ku kamaja, pajr~…ĺumar~…ĺumaan par~…ĺuma i putańß i tukus ku kamaja. asu Ē~ ° mukan ku ńß…ô ¶i. tan…ôkt…ôk ku kir~…ĺaŇč, u mat…ôk…ôsaj a kir~…ĺaŇč kujni. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika **(**:diospjros strigosa) .
